name: Ealixir, Inc.
summary: Flint Telecom Group, Inc. is a Nevada Corporation providing next-generation turnkey voice, data, and wireless telecom services through partner channels primarily in the United States. Operating through four subsidiaries, it distributes broadband equipment, prepaid international calling cards, VoIP telephony solutions for SMEs, and white-label telecom services for cable companies and ISPs. Its three business segments are telecom software/services/equipment, prepaid telecom services, and subscriber-based VoIP and cellular services.
